description:
Ping remote services for availability

Heartbeat is a beat for testing service availability using PING based on ICMP, TCP or higher level protocols.
Features and enhancements
All
- Export all Beat receiver metrics to OTel telemetry. #49300
- Add add_agent_metadata processor to inject agent metadata efficiently. #49667
- Update OTel Collector components to v0.149.0/v1.55.0. #50057
Elastic agent
- Logstash exporter now reports accurate error status to EDOT. #49169
Filebeat
- Add a lexicographical polling mode to the AWS-S3 input. #48310 #47926
- Optimize opening files in filestream for better performance. #48506
- Instruments the CEL input with OpenTelemetry tracing. #48440
- Add ES state store routing for lexicographical mode. #48944
- Add an experimental bbolt-based registry backend for Filebeat. #48879
- Add MFA enrichment support to the azure-ad entity analytics provider. #49843
- Add a querylog fileset to the Filebeat elasticsearch module for NDJSON query logs. #49914 #43622
- Optimize filestream to allocate less memory when applying include/exclude line filters. #49013
- Add capacity to collect empty Active Directory groups to entity analytics input. #49093
- Add input redirection support through a new Redirector mechanism. #49613
- Allow HTTP JSON input redirection to the CEL input. #49614
- Update mito CEL library to v1.25.1 and cel-go runtime to v0.27.0. #49683
- Add perms enrichment option to the Okta entity analytics provider to collect permissions for custom roles. #49805 #49779
- Add a devices enrichment option to the Okta entity analytics provider. #49813 #49780
- Add a supervises enrichment option to the Okta entity analytics provider. #49825 #49781
Filebeat, metricbeat
- Add NewFactoryWithSettings for Beat receivers to provide default home and path directories. #49327 #11734
Heartbeat
- Add custom policy hashing and live-update functionality to integrations, allowing parameters to be updated without restarting the monitor. #49326 #47511
Metricbeat
- Add cursor-based incremental data fetching to the SQL module query metricset. #48722
- Add switchport_statuses config option to filter Meraki switchports by status. #47993
- Add the subexpiry field to the Redis INFO Keyspace (Redis ≥ 7.4). #47971 #26555
- Add Redis 6.0/7.0 info fields and deprecate used_memory_lua. #48246
- Add state field to IPSec tunnel metrics in panw module. #48403
- Map Docker network metrics to different types for better usability. #47792
- Add observer.hostname field to panw module. #48825
- Bump azure-sdk-for-go armmonitor from v0.8.0 to v0.11.0. #49866
Osquerybeat
- Add an elastic_jumplists table to the Osquery extension. #47759
- Add a code generator for creating typed Go packages from YAML table/view specifications. #48533
- Add automatic jumplists to the elastic_jumplists table. #48032
- Add elastic_host_processes and elastic_host_users tables and host_processes and host_users views. #48794
- Add optional query profiling for scheduled and live Osquery runs. #49514
- Updates Osquerybeat filters to avoid reliance on type assertion. #48540
- Allow for passing of osqueryd client to extension tables. #48544
- Improve gentables and add elastic_browser_history specification with registry integration. #48733
- Migrate elastic_file_analysis table to Osquery table specification and a dedicated package. #48774
- Add elastic_host_groups table, host_groups view, and default view hooks in generator. #48775
- Add amcache table, view specifications and generated tables/view for Osquery extension. #48802
- Add native scheduled query metadata and schedule_id correlation fields. #49040
- Add elastic_jumplists specification integration and harden Osquerybeat generation workflow. #49058
- Add support for per-platform custom osqueryd artifact install in Osquerybeat. #49306 #48955
Fixes
Agentbeat
- Update transient dependency github.com/go-jose/go-jose/v4 to v4.1.4. #49975
All
- Update Go to v1.25.9. #50049
- Bump aws-sdk-go-v2/service/cloudwatchlogs to v1.65.0 to fix GHSA-xmrv-pmrh-hhx2. #50215
Filebeat
- Support abuse.ch auth key usage in the Threat Intel module. #45212 #45206
- Fix max_body_bytes setting not working without HMAC and add missing documentation configuration options in HTTP Endpoint input. #48550 #48512
- Fix http_endpoint input shared server lifecycle causing joiner deadlock and creator killing unrelated inputs. #49415
- Fix a typo in CEL input OTel tracing logging. #49692 #49625
- Fix the container input not respecting max_bytes when parsing CRI partial lines. #49743 #49259
- Fix internal processing time metric for azureeventhub input. #40547
- Fix CSV decoder producing malformed JSON when field values contain double quotes in azure-blob-storage input. #50097
- Update cel-go to v0.28.0, fixing runtime error location reporting. #50176
- Re-evaluate url_program on each websocket reconnect using evolved cursor state. #50383
- Reduce allocation pressure in httpjson cursor update and split paths. #50384
Libbeat
- Fix conversion of time duration fields such as event.duration when using Beat receivers. #50302
Metricbeat
- AutoOps ES module update to use UUID v7 without dashes to reduce payloads. #50078
Osquerybeat
- Fix jumplist table to ensure embedded fields are exported. #49649
- Avoid mutating osquery install config during validation to prevent races. #49769
Packetbeat
- Fix janitor goroutine leaks and decoder cleanup lifecycle on route changes. #48836
Winlogbeat
- Fix no_more_events stop losing final batch of events when io.EOF is returned alongside records. #49012 #47388
